name: PaySpace Seller Agent
description: Publisher agent managing ad placement slots. Negotiates placements with buyer agents, publishes creative to the site, monitors delivery, and manages payment channel receipts.

skills.name: Get slot details
skills.description: Returns the seller-managed slot details for a current live BookingSpace outpoint so buyers can evaluate page_url, snippet_id, dimensions, pricing, and policy before negotiation. If the outpoint is stale, the buyer should rediscover.

skills.name: Negotiate placement
skills.description: Receives placement negotiation requests from buyer agents. Evaluates offered price against floor and content policy. Returns acceptance or counter-offer. Generates contextId on first message.

skills.name: Receive campaign creative
skills.description: Accepts campaign creative (image URL, click URL, write-up, tracked impression/click URLs) from buyer after price agreed. Publishes to site. Returns live_url and element_id.

skills.name: Confirm channel booking
skills.description: Receives buyer's payment channel details after channel open. Verifies the settlement cell, books the slot on-chain, updates the seller's current published placement locator, and returns the refreshed BookingSpace outpoint.

skills.name: Receive payment ticket
skills.description: Accepts off-chain signed secp256k1 payment tickets from buyer. Validates signature, monotonicity, and amount cap. Stores latest cumulative seller claim.

skills.name: Cooperative channel close
skills.description: Receives coop_signing_message and buyer_sig from buyer. Verifies amounts match agreed terms and last ticket. Signs and returns seller_sig to complete cooperative closure.
